description: Prisma platform status command - UI components + database client code
rationale: Call-graph analysis: CLI output rendering files, management API client code, and supporting utilities form 3+ disconnected components with no shared call-graph edges. No single function call chain connects all changed files = ERROR.
notes: Previously warning (ui+database = 2 domains). Call-graph connectivity reveals 3+ independent clusters of files, escalating from warning to error.
